{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Refuge
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Refuge]] is a town where the residents of [[Sacred Valley]] found shelter.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Refuge]] is an existing [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
